question: What are the names of clients who have never made an order?
sql: SELECT Name FROM Client WHERE IdClient NOT IN (SELECT IdClient FROM Orders);

back_translation.intent: 查找没有下过订单的客户姓名
filters: IdClient NOT IN (SELECT IdClient FROM Orders)

semantic.reason: 语义完全一致。SQL描述正确实现了原始问题要求，通过NOT IN子查询准确筛选出未下单客户，涉及的Client和Orders表、Name列均符合需求，且无额外聚合/分组/排序操作。
